form.formComment: Effortless winner showing plenty of speed to score by 7 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a lightning 29.44 over the 520m trip. Expected to push the clock again here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Effortless winner showing plenty of speed to score by 7 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a lightning 29.44 over the 520m trip. Expected to push the clock again here.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 1.5 lengths fourth (29.76) over 520m at this track. Leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 1.5 lengths fourth (29.76) over 520m at this track. Leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on the heels entering the home straight and lost momentum.
Began awkwardly and was slow to begin.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 8 length third (30.01) over 520m at this track. Boasts a course and distance PB in a dazzling 29.47. Must include.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 8 length third (30.01) over 520m at this track. Boasts a course and distance PB in a dazzling 29.47. Must include.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the front straight and was checked as a consequence.

form.formComment: Was edged out last time at this track when beaten just a nose but did clock a scintillating 29.40 for the 520m journey. This tougher but prefer for a place this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was edged out last time at this track when beaten just a nose but did clock a scintillating 29.40 for the 520m journey. This tougher but prefer for a place this time.

form.formComment: Facing tougher opposition than she has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Needs to do more. Others better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Facing tougher opposition than she has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Needs to do more. Others better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th over 515m at Gosford beaten 14 lengths (30.54) behind Great Chat in a Grade 4/5 on March 10. Placed two back at Gosford. Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th over 515m at Gosford beaten 14 lengths (30.54) behind Great Chat in a Grade 4/5 on March 10. Placed two back at Gosford. Well placed and among the chances here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Nearing the exit to the back straight was crowded for room and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior was an impressive winner scoring by 0.8 lengths in a NG at this track and clocking a hot 29.48 for the 520m trip. Can measure up on top win two back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior was an impressive winner scoring by 0.8 lengths in a NG at this track and clocking a hot 29.48 for the 520m trip. Can measure up on top win two back.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage eighth but before that won by 0.8 lengths at this track (29.78) beating Tarawi Brumby in a Grade 5 on April 4. Didn't show up last start but give him another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage eighth but before that won by 0.8 lengths at this track (29.78) beating Tarawi Brumby in a Grade 5 on April 4. Didn't show up last start but give him another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Forced wide by contact in the first turn and lost momentum.
